revision.comment: Changed the article name in the template from bold italics to bold in quotation marks.
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Sister project
|project = Wikisource
|text = [[Wikisource]] has the text of {{#if:{{{2|}}}|a|the}} {{{year|1905}}} ''[[New International Encyclopedia]]'' article {{#if:{{{2|}}}|about}} "'''[[s:The New International Encyclopædia/{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{{2|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}]]'''".
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{Sister project
|project = Wikisource
|text = [[Wikisource]] has the text of {{#if:{{{2|}}}|a|the}} {{{year|1905}}} ''[[New International Encyclopedia]]'' article {{#if:{{{2|}}}|about}} "'''[[s:The New International Encyclopædia/{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{{2|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}]]'''".
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Sister project
|project = Wikisource
|text = [[Wikisource]] has the text of {{#if:{{{2|}}}|a|the}} {{{year|1905}}} ''[[:en:New International Encyclopedia|New International Encyclopedia]]'' article {{#if:{{{2|}}}|about}} "'''[[s:The New International Encyclopædia/{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{{2|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}]]'''".
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Sister project
|project = Wikisource
|text = [[:en:Wikisource|Wikisource]] has the text of {{#if:{{{2|}}}|a|the}} {{{year|1905}}} ''[[:en:New International Encyclopedia|New International Encyclopedia]]'' article {{#if:{{{2|}}}|about}} "'''[[s:The New International Encyclopædia/{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{{2|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}]]'''".
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: <includeonly>{{Sister project |project = Wikisource |text = [[:en:Wikisource|Wikisource]] has the text of {{#if:{{{2|}}}|a|the}} {{{year|1905}}} ''[[:en:New International Encyclopedia|New International Encyclopedia]]'' article {{#if:{{{2|}}}|about}} "'''[[s:The New International Encyclopædia/{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{{2|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}]]'''". }}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Sister project
|project = Wikisource
|text = [[:en:Wikisource|Wikisource]] has the text of {{#if:{{{2|}}}|a|the}} {{{year|1905}}} ''[[:en:New International Encyclopedia|New International Encyclopedia]]'' article {{#if:{{{2|}}}|about}} "'''[[s:The New International Encyclopædia/{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{{2|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}]]'''".
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: <includeonly>{{Sister project |project = Wikisource |text = [[:en:Wikisource|Wikisource]] has the text of {{#if:{{{2|}}}|a|the}} {{{year|1905}}} ''[[:en:New International Encyclopedia|New International Encyclopedia]]'' article {{#if:{{{2|}}}|about}} "'''[[s:The New International Encyclopædia/{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{{2|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}]]'''". }}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23515730952|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <includeonly>{{Sister project |project = Wikisource |text = [[:en:Wikisource|Wikisource]] has the text of {{#if:{{{2|}}}|a|the}} {{{year|1905}}} ''[[:en:New International Encyclopedia|New International Encyclopedia]]'' article {{#if:{{{2|}}}|about}} "'''[[s:The New International Encyclopædia/{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{{2|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}]]'''". }}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

<includeonly>{{Sister project |project = Wikisource |text = [[:en:Wikisource|Wikisource]] has the text of {{#if:{{{2|}}}|a|the}} {{{year|1905}}} ''[[:en:New International Encyclopedia|New International Encyclopedia]]'' article {{#if:{{{2|}}}|about}} "'''[[s:The New International Encyclopædia/{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{{2|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}]]'''". }}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}}
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
